holdings.infoBox: MFEM is an equity ETF with a total of 745 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hyundai Motor Company stock at 3.01%, Delta Electronics at 2.76%, SK hynix at 2.63%, Samsung Electronics at 1.88%, and MediaTek at 1.62%.

overview.description: The PIMCO RAFI Dynamic Multi-Factor Emerging Markets Equity ETF (MFEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of emerging-market companies that are selected and weighted by a combination of fundamental and technical factors. MFEM was launched on Aug 31, 2017 and is issued by PIMCO.
